alfredsnippet.snippet:
2. Locker and Equipment Room
General appearance description. 1-3 sentences. Consider hitting 3-5 senses.
Wights Attack: There are 2 wights
Shelving Unit: Mostly empty, plenty of mining equipment, mechanical parts, a crystalline structure housed in a metal and glass housing. Goggles of Night.
	•	GM Background: The majority of the replacements parts are missing due to the frequent fixes over the last few weeks.
Clothing Stands: The hooks are mostly empty except for the last two, which have Navy work clothing
Locked Glass Cabinet (DC 20 Dexterity): The glass cabinets are mostly empty except for 3 flasks with liquid in them.
	•	Flasks**:** 2 x Potions of Healing (Greater), Potion of Fire Protection
alfredsnippet.name: key
